creator: lasg@lasg.dk
text:
As answer to Kris Kennaways mail "[FreeBSD-Announce] Volunteers needed to help maintain ports", from may 25. 2006, and with the information from http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing-ports/adopt-port.html
I would like to maintain the port security/mdcrack
I'm using the program in FreeBSD 6.1-RELEASE, and have a basic knowledge about C and secure coding.

Fix: 

set MAINTAINER to lasg@lasg.dk
